---
title: "main"
format: html
---
```{r}
#packages
library("tidyverse")
library("ggplot2")
library("dplyr")
```

The data are from 1/28/2019 to 3/28/2026
split the data before November 30, 2022 (the publish of chatGPT) and after
```{r}
#load data
data <- read.csv("XLK ETF Stock Price History.csv")
```

```{r}
# change date 
data$Date <- as.Date(data$Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y") 
data <- data |>
  filter(trimws(Vol.) != "")
```

```{r}
#split into two time frames
cutoff <- as.Date("2022-11-30")
before_data <- data[data$Date < cutoff, ]
after_data  <- data[data$Date >= cutoff, ]
```

## EDA 
- check if data is white noise, or MA, or AR
```{r}
plot(data$Date, data$Price, type = "l")
```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(before_data$Date, before_data$Price, type = "l")
plot(after_data$Date, after_data$Price, type = "l", col = "blue")
```
```{r}
#detrend
model_data <- data(x= Date, y= Price)
fit <- lm(x~y, data = data)
summary(fit)$coefficients


```
